topic: A scarecrow appeared in the field behind my house, closer to my door every week.
title: The Scarecrow Is Getting Closer | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A scarecrow stands in the field behind my house, closer each week.
scenes.image_prompt: A distant scarecrow in a wide misty field at dusk, low light, soft fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: There was never a scarecrow there before this autumn.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty harvested field behind a small house at twilight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It just appeared one foggy morning.
scenes.image_prompt: A lone scarecrow silhouette in heavy field fog at dawn, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By the next week it stood twenty paces nearer the fence.
scenes.image_prompt: A scarecrow nearer to a wooden fence line behind a yard, dim evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I marked its place with stakes.
scenes.image_prompt: Wooden stakes pressed into a field beside a distant scarecrow, low light, soft grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each week it passed every mark, always closer to me.
scenes.image_prompt: A scarecrow standing past a line of stakes in a foggy field, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I walked out to inspect it once.
scenes.image_prompt: A person approaching a tall scarecrow across an open field at dusk, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Its head had turned to follow the path back to my door.
scenes.image_prompt: A scarecrow with its straw head angled toward a distant house, low light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Now it stands just beyond my back fence at night.
scenes.image_prompt: A scarecrow looming close behind a low wooden fence in the dark, dim moonlight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning its boots were muddy, and the field was dry.
scenes.image_prompt: The base of a scarecrow with mud caked boots over dry cracked ground, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I locked every door and stopped looking out the window.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed back door with curtains drawn, faint light at the edges, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Tonight the field is empty, and something stands on my porch.
scenes.image_prompt: An empty foggy field at night beyond a yard, a tall shape near the porch, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
